Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by EREKLE CHAMALECHIVI.
Attorney FRANCISCO TORRES for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ian Sheffield is present.
Attorney DANIEL EVANS appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ELAN LAMBERT, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEBRUARY 3, 2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
